memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, int stream, struct uaol_config *cfg)
memberdef.name: uaol_config

simplesect.para: 0 on success, all other values should be treated as error.
0 on success, all other values should be treated as error.
0 on success, all other values should be treated as error.

memberdef.argsstring: (const struct device *dev, int stream, struct uaol_ep_table_entry entry, bool valid)
memberdef.name: uaol_program_ep_table

briefdescription.para: Program an endpoint table entry for UAOL individual stream.

parameterdescription.para: Data to be stored in EP table.
Flag marking an entry as valid or invalid.

simplesect.para: 0 on success, all other values should be treated as error.
0 on success, all other values should be treated as error.

briefdescription.para: Get the HDA link stream ID mapped in HW to the UAOL stream ID.

detaileddescription.para: Can be called anytime, e.g., before the device probe.

simplesect.para: the HDA link stream ID on success, otherwise -1.

briefdescription.para: Public APIs for USB Audio Offload Link (UAOL) drivers.
